title: Fit test - Starting Fit Test with one Earbud disconnected [TO BE UPDATED]
scenario: Fit Test can be started with one earbud disconnected on Voyager Free 60+/Free 20, but disconnected earbud shows yellow icon and "Fail" tag with appropriate message
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Voyager Free 60+ or Free 20 is connected via Bluetooth, with one earbud disconnected (e.g., left earbud removed from the charging case or powered off).
3. From the Home screen, navigate to Fit Test. (Path: Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Tutorials, Onboarding, User Guides → Fit Test)
4. Tap the Start button to begin the Fit Test.
5. Observe the results displayed for both earbuds.
expected: The Fit Test should start successfully. Results for the connected earbud should be properly displayed. The disconnected earbud should always be marked with a yellow icon and a "Fail" tag, with the text: "The {right/left} earbud was disconnected during the fit test".
